name: obsidian-high-recall
description: Local-first high-recall search for Obsidian vaults, usable from Codex and CLI.

scripts.check: node --check skills/obsidian-high-recall/scripts/obsidian_high_recall.mjs && node --check skills/obsidian-high-recall/scripts/evaluate_recall.mjs && node --check skills/obsidian-high-recall/scripts/rrf_union.mjs && node --check scripts/assert_fixture_metrics.mjs && node --check scripts/assert_rrf_union.mjs && node --check scripts/assert_skill_structure.mjs && node --check scripts/assert_positioning_docs.mjs && node --check scripts/assert_demo_docs.mjs && node --check scripts/assert_public_examples.mjs && node --check scripts/assert_install_docs.mjs && node --check scripts/assert_recipes_docs.mjs && node --check scripts/assert_cli_help.mjs && node --check scripts/assert_output_contract.mjs && node --check scripts/assert_doctor.mjs && node --check scripts/assert_pack_contents.mjs && node --check scripts/assert_package_bin.mjs && node --check scripts/assert_no_private_leaks.mjs && node --check scripts/assert_privacy_docs.mjs && node --check scripts/assert_markdown_links.mjs && node --check scripts/assert_ci_workflow.mjs && node --check scripts/assert_site_metadata.mjs && node --check scripts/assert_release_docs.mjs && node --check scripts/assert_community_files.mjs && node scripts/assert_rrf_union.mjs && node scripts/assert_skill_structure.mjs && node scripts/assert_positioning_docs.mjs && node scripts/assert_demo_docs.mjs && node scripts/assert_public_examples.mjs && node scripts/assert_install_docs.mjs && node scripts/assert_recipes_docs.mjs && node scripts/assert_cli_help.mjs && node scripts/assert_output_contract.mjs && node scripts/assert_doctor.mjs && node scripts/assert_pack_contents.mjs && node scripts/assert_package_bin.mjs && node scripts/assert_no_private_leaks.mjs && node scripts/assert_privacy_docs.mjs && node scripts/assert_markdown_links.mjs && node scripts/assert_ci_workflow.mjs && node scripts/assert_site_metadata.mjs && node scripts/assert_release_docs.mjs && node scripts/assert_community_files.mjs
scripts.smoke:fixture: node skills/obsidian-high-recall/scripts/evaluate_recall.mjs .tmp/fixture-eval --vault docs/fixtures/demo-vault --cases docs/fixtures/demo_cases.json --backends smart --ks 5,10 --limit 20 --per-channel 20 --neighbor-seeds 0 && node scripts/assert_fixture_metrics.mjs .tmp/fixture-eval/metrics.json
scripts.test: npm run check && npm run smoke:fixture
